<!--
  Pull Request Template — Plexica v2

  Fill in every section. PRs with incomplete descriptions will be sent back.
  Reference the related issue with "Fixes #<number>" or "Relates to #<number>".

  Constitution reminders:
  - Rule 1: every user-facing change needs a Playwright E2E test
  - Rule 2: CI must be green before merge
  - Rule 4: no file above 200 lines
  - Rule 6: commit messages in English only
-->

- [ ] Breaking change (requires migration notes below)

## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format and are in English
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] No file I changed exceeds 200 lines
- [ ] No `console.log` left in production code
- [ ] No secrets or PII committed
- [ ] CI is green on this branch
